assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four types: security patches & CVEs, end-of-life warnings, auto-upgrade notifications, and available version updates

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns CRITICAL priority to security patches, HIGH to auto-upgrades and EOL warnings, MEDIUM to available version updates, and LOW to informational items

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EOL warnings require planning immediate upgrade and coordinating with teams, with timeline before EOL date

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed auto-upgrade preparation checklist including compatibility testing, backup procedures, and stakeholder notification

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response specifies security patches require immediate action within 24-48 hours for critical CVEs and includes emergency maintenance window scheduling

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes new version notifications as MEDIUM priority for planning in next maintenance cycle, not immediate action

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response provides email filtering setup but does not mention Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response mentions reviewing release notes, patch notes, and upgrade changelog as part of the response procedures
